scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-schema.js && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @arsnova/backend" "npm run start:en -w @arsnova/frontend"
scripts.dev:de: node scripts/ensure-schema.js && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @arsnova/backend" "npm run start:de -w @arsnova/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @arsnova/shared-types && npm run build -w @arsnova/backend && npm run build -w @arsnova/frontend
scripts.build:landing: (cd apps/landing && export NODE_PATH="$(cd ../.. && pwd)/node_modules" && export PUBLIC_GITHUB_REPO="${PUBLIC_GITHUB_REPO:-$(node scripts/get-github-repo.mjs 2>/dev/null || echo 'kqc-real/arsnova.eu')}" && node ../../node_modules/astro/astro.js build)
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @arsnova/shared-types && npm run typecheck -w @arsnova/backend && npm run typecheck -w @arsnova/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @arsnova/backend && npm run test -w @arsnova/frontend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w @arsnova/backend && npm run test:coverage -w @arsnova/frontend
scripts.setup:dev: npm run docker:up:dev && npm run prisma:push && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build -w @arsnova/shared-types
scripts.build:prod: npm run build -w @arsnova/shared-types && npm run build -w @arsnova/backend && npm run build:localize -w @arsnova/frontend
